input_text: Ibu tunggal Melayu ni memang tak ada maruah. Bercerai sebab gatal, lepas tu bebankan masyarakat. Patut kena halau dari kampung.
reason: Shames Malay single mothers as immoral burdens on society and calls for their ostracism, combining communal stigma with targeted dehumanization.
suggested_rewrite: Ibu tunggal menghadapi pelbagai cabaran dan layak mendapat sokongan masyarakat, bukan penghakiman. Kita patut membantu mereka membina kehidupan yang lebih baik.

input_text: Janda Cina ni memang suka goda laki orang. Dah cerai pun nak kacau rumahtangga jiran. Kaum ni memang rosak moral.
reason: Stereotypes Chinese divorcees as home-wreckers and attributes moral corruption to an entire ethnic group, combining gender-based abuse with communal hostility.
suggested_rewrite: Status perkahwinan seseorang bukan ukuran moral mereka. Kita tidak sepatutnya menghakimi seseorang berdasarkan kaum atau status peribadi.

input_text: Kerajaan dah luluskan dasar baru — semua tanah rizab Melayu akan dijual kepada pemaju Cina menjelang 2027. Dokumen bocor dari PMO!
reason: Fabricates a government policy leak about selling Malay reserve land to Chinese developers, designed to incite ethnic panic and distrust in government.
suggested_rewrite: Sebarang perubahan dasar tanah rizab perlu disahkan melalui saluran rasmi kerajaan. Jangan mudah percaya maklumat yang tidak disahkan.

input_text: Datuk Seri XXXX dari Johor ni kaki rasuah terbesar. Semua orang tahu dia ambil RM50 juta tapi polis tak buat apa. Kita kena serang pejabat dia!
reason: Makes unverified corruption allegations against a named official and explicitly calls for a physical attack on their office, combining targeted abuse with incitement to violence.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada bukti rasuah, buat laporan kepada SPRM atau pihak berkuasa. Tindakan ganas bukan penyelesaian yang sah.

input_text: Kawasan Bukit Jalil dah jadi macam Little China. Melayu tak mampu beli rumah sebab Cina borong semua. Kita kena boikot pemaju yang jual kepada mereka!
reason: Frames property market competition in ethnic terms and calls for boycotts targeting a specific racial group, stoking communal division over housing.
suggested_rewrite: Isu kemampuan perumahan memerlukan penyelesaian dasar yang inklusif. Kita patut menyokong polisi perumahan mampu milik untuk semua rakyat Malaysia.

input_text: Single mothers dari kaum India ni paling teruk. Banyak anak tapi tak mampu nak jaga. Bebankan sistem kebajikan negara. Patut kena mandulkan.
reason: Targets Indian single mothers with eugenics-like rhetoric, dehumanizing them as welfare burdens and calling for forced sterilization based on ethnicity.
suggested_rewrite: Semua ibu tunggal berhak mendapat bantuan kebajikan tanpa diskriminasi. Sistem sokongan perlu diperkukuhkan untuk membantu keluarga yang memerlukan.

input_text: TERKINI: Surat rasmi bocor — kerajaan akan hapuskan kuota Bumiputera untuk perumahan mulai bulan depan. Share sebelum dipadam!
reason: Fabricates an urgent government document leak about abolishing Bumiputera housing quotas, designed to create panic and ethnic resentment.
suggested_rewrite: Sebarang perubahan dasar kuota Bumiputera akan diumumkan secara rasmi. Sila semak sumber rasmi sebelum menyebarkan maklumat.

input_text: Janda Melayu yang kahwin dengan bukan Islam tu memang murtad. Patut kena rejam. Masyarakat kita tak perlukan sampah macam ni.
reason: Calls for stoning of Malay divorcees who remarry non-Muslims, combining extreme religious provocation with violent targeted abuse.
suggested_rewrite: Hal-hal berkaitan agama dan perkahwinan adalah urusan peribadi yang dilindungi undang-undang. Kita harus menghormati hak individu.

input_text: Pemaju India kat Penang ni dah mula beli tanah wakaf secara haram. Ada bukti dari orang dalam. Kena viralkan supaya rakyat bangkit!
reason: Spreads unverified claims about Indian developers illegally buying waqf land, using ethnic framing to incite public outrage based on fabricated insider information.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada kebimbangan mengenai tanah wakaf, laporkan kepada Majlis Agama Islam Negeri. Jangan sebarkan dakwaan yang tidak disahkan.

input_text: Menteri XXXX ni sebenarnya ada akaun bank di Singapura dengan RM200 juta. Kawan dia yang kerja bank confirm. Rakyat kena serbu rumah dia!
reason: Makes unverified financial corruption claims against a named minister and incites the public to storm their home, combining character assassination with violent incitement.
suggested_rewrite: Dakwaan rasuah perlu disokong dengan bukti dan dilaporkan kepada SPRM. Tindakan main hakim sendiri adalah menyalahi undang-undang.

input_text: Perempuan cerai ni jangan bagi kerja. Diorang bawa sial dan masalah ke tempat kerja. Majikan Melayu kena blacklist semua janda.
reason: Advocates employment discrimination against divorced women, framing them as bringing bad luck and problems, with ethnic-specific targeting.
suggested_rewrite: Diskriminasi pekerjaan berdasarkan status perkahwinan adalah tidak adil dan menyalahi undang-undang. Semua pekerja layak dinilai berdasarkan kebolehan.

input_text: TERBONGKAR: Dokumen rahsia tunjuk kerajaan akan beri 1 juta hektar tanah di Sabah kepada syarikat milik kaum tertentu. Melayu bangunlah!
reason: Fabricates a secret government land deal in Sabah framed as ethnic dispossession, designed to trigger racial panic among Malays.
suggested_rewrite: Dakwaan mengenai perjanjian tanah perlu disahkan melalui sumber rasmi. Penyebaran maklumat palsu boleh menjejaskan keharmonian kaum.

input_text: Ibu tunggal kampung ni sebenarnya pelacur. Anak banyak bapa lain-lain. Memalukan bangsa Melayu. Halau dari surau!
reason: Brands single mothers as sex workers and calls for their exclusion from religious spaces, combining sexual shaming with communal religious ostracism.
suggested_rewrite: Ibu tunggal berhak menghadiri surau dan mendapat sokongan spiritual. Mengaibkan mereka bertentangan dengan nilai-nilai ihsan dalam Islam.

input_text: Harga rumah kat Shah Alam naik gila sebab Cina dah mula masuk beli senyap-senyap. Kita kena halang sebelum kawasan Melayu hilang!
reason: Blames Chinese buyers for property price increases in a Malay-majority area and calls for blocking them, framing property markets in ethnic siege terms.
suggested_rewrite: Kenaikan harga rumah adalah isu ekonomi yang memerlukan penyelesaian dasar. Semua rakyat Malaysia berhak membeli hartanah mengikut undang-undang.

input_text: YB XXXX dah kaya raya dengan projek kroni. Nombor plat kereta, alamat rumah dia kat sini. Jom kita pergi ramai-ramai bagi pengajaran!
reason: Doxxes a public official by sharing personal details and explicitly calls for a mob to confront them, combining privacy violations with incitement to violence.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada bukti salah guna kuasa, laporkan kepada pihak berkuasa yang berkenaan. Jangan dedahkan maklumat peribadi atau bertindak secara ganas.

input_text: Janda India yang tinggal flat kos rendah tu sebenarnya penipu kebajikan. Tipu bantuan kerajaan. Kaum ni memang suka ambil kesempatan.
reason: Accuses Indian single mothers of welfare fraud and generalizes the claim to an entire ethnic group, combining targeted abuse with communal stereotyping.
suggested_rewrite: Dakwaan penipuan kebajikan perlu disiasat oleh pihak berkuasa. Kita tidak sepatutnya menghakimi seseorang berdasarkan kaum mereka.

input_text: Memo dalaman bocor: KWSP akan potong caruman Bumiputera untuk subsidi rumah mampu milik kepada bukan Melayu. Ini pengkhianatan!
reason: Fabricates an EPF internal memo about redirecting Bumiputera funds to non-Malays, designed to inflame ethnic resentment through fake institutional betrayal.
suggested_rewrite: Dasar KWSP diumumkan secara rasmi melalui saluran yang sah. Jangan percaya maklumat yang tidak dapat disahkan.

input_text: Perempuan cerai ni jangan masuk masjid. Diorang bawa fitnah dan aib. Ustaz patut larang keras kehadiran mereka.
reason: Calls for banning divorcees from mosques, weaponizing religious authority to ostracize vulnerable women from spiritual community.
suggested_rewrite: Masjid adalah tempat ibadat untuk semua umat Islam tanpa mengira status perkahwinan. Kita harus menyambut semua yang ingin beribadat.

input_text: Kawasan Cyberjaya dah mula dikuasai pemaju dari kaum tertentu. Kalau Melayu tak bertindak sekarang, tanah kita semua akan hilang!
reason: Frames property development in Cyberjaya as ethnic land seizure, using urgency rhetoric to incite communal panic about territorial loss.
suggested_rewrite: Pembangunan hartanah di Cyberjaya dikawal oleh peraturan kerajaan. Kebimbangan mengenai hartanah patut disuarakan melalui saluran yang betul.

input_text: Single mother Melayu yang ambil bantuan kerajaan ni sebenarnya malas. Kahwin tak fikir, beranak tak fikir, lepas tu harapkan duit rakyat.
reason: Characterizes Malay single mothers on government aid as lazy and irresponsible, using communal framing to shame welfare recipients.
suggested_rewrite: Bantuan kerajaan untuk ibu tunggal bertujuan membantu keluarga yang memerlukan. Kita patut menyokong usaha mereka untuk berdikari.

input_text: Pegawai daerah XXXX dari Perak tu dah korup bertahun-tahun. Ni gambar rumah banglo dia. Kita viralkan dan biar dia malu sampai bunuh diri.
reason: Doxxes a named district officer with photos of their home and expresses a desire for them to self-harm from shame, combining privacy exposure with extreme harassment.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada bukti rasuah, buat laporan rasmi kepada SPRM. Mendedahkan maklumat peribadi dan mengharapkan kemudaratan adalah tidak bermoral dan menyalahi undang-undang.

input_text: BREAKING: Kerajaan dah sign perjanjian rahsia dengan Singapura untuk jual air Johor pada harga murah. Dokumen ada kat sini!
reason: Fabricates a secret bilateral agreement on Johor water rights to inflame nationalist sentiment and distrust of government, using fake document claims.
suggested_rewrite: Perjanjian air antara Malaysia dan Singapura adalah hal diplomatik yang diumumkan secara rasmi. Sila rujuk sumber rasmi untuk maklumat tepat.

input_text: Janda Cina kat Penang ni memang terkenal jadi perampas suami. Budaya diorang memang macam tu. Lelaki Melayu kena jauhi!
reason: Stereotypes Chinese divorcees in Penang as husband-stealers and attributes this to cultural deficiency, urging ethnic avoidance based on prejudice.
suggested_rewrite: Menghakimi seseorang berdasarkan kaum dan status perkahwinan adalah tidak adil. Setiap individu harus dinilai berdasarkan perwatakan mereka sendiri.

input_text: Wakil rakyat XXXX dari Selangor ni guna duit pembangunan untuk beli kereta mewah. Nombor telefon dan IC dia ada dalam thread ni. Kita humban dia!
reason: Shares a representative's personal IC and phone number alongside unverified corruption claims, then incites physical confrontation.
suggested_rewrite: Dakwaan salah guna dana pembangunan perlu dilaporkan kepada SPRM dengan bukti. Jangan dedahkan maklumat peribadi atau bertindak ganas.

input_text: Tanah Felda kita dah mula dijual kepada syarikat asing milik orang bukan Melayu. Kerajaan khianati peneroka. Kita kena turun padang sekarang!
reason: Spreads false claims about Felda land being sold to non-Malay foreign companies, inciting ethnic panic and calls for unspecified mass action.
suggested_rewrite: Kebimbangan mengenai tanah Felda patut disuarakan melalui saluran rasmi. Pastikan maklumat disahkan sebelum disebarkan.

input_text: Ibu tunggal yang kerja malam ni kita semua tahu buat apa sebenarnya. Jangan bagi anak-anak mereka masuk sekolah agama. Nanti rosak akhlak anak kita.
reason: Insinuates that single mothers working night shifts are sex workers and calls for excluding their children from religious schools, weaponizing religion against vulnerable families.
suggested_rewrite: Ramai ibu tunggal bekerja syif malam demi menyara keluarga. Anak-anak mereka berhak mendapat pendidikan agama seperti semua kanak-kanak lain.

input_text: Projek rumah mampu milik kat Seremban dah dikuasai sindiket pembeli Cina. Nama Melayu digunakan sebagai proxy. Ini perang ekonomi terhadap kita!
reason: Fabricates a Chinese buyer syndicate conspiracy in Seremban affordable housing, framing property markets as ethnic warfare.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada kebimbangan mengenai penipuan dalam pembelian rumah mampu milik, laporkan kepada pihak berkuasa perumahan untuk siasatan.

input_text: ADUN XXXX guna peruntukan untuk beli tanah atas nama isteri. Alamat tanah dia kat sini. Jom bakar pagar dia malam ni.
reason: Makes unverified land fraud claims, exposes a politician's property address, and explicitly calls for arson, combining privacy exposure with violent incitement.
suggested_rewrite: Dakwaan salah guna peruntukan perlu dilaporkan kepada SPRM dengan bukti. Tindakan jenayah seperti pembakaran bukan penyelesaian.

input_text: Wanita cerai dari komuniti India ni punca penyakit sosial kat flat PPR. Budak-budak diorang nakal dan rosak. Kena pindahkan semua keluar.
reason: Blames Indian single mothers for social problems in public housing and demands their mass removal, combining ethnic scapegoating with targeted abuse.
suggested_rewrite: Masalah sosial di PPR memerlukan penyelesaian bersama. Menyalahkan satu komuniti tidak membantu menyelesaikan cabaran yang dihadapi.

input_text: EKSKLUSIF: Kerajaan negeri Selangor dah luluskan 5000 lot rumah untuk warga asing dari China. Bumiputera tak dapat langsung. Dokumen bocor kat sini!
reason: Fabricates a Selangor state government housing allocation for Chinese nationals at the expense of Bumiputera, using fake leaked documents to stoke ethnic resentment.
suggested_rewrite: Dasar perumahan negeri perlu disahkan melalui laman web rasmi kerajaan negeri. Jangan mudah percaya dakwaan yang tidak disahkan.

input_text: Janda Melayu yang kahwin lagi dengan lelaki bukan Islam tu patut dibuang warganegara. Pengkhianat agama dan bangsa!
reason: Calls for revoking citizenship of Malay divorcees who remarry non-Muslims, framing personal choices as religious and racial betrayal.
suggested_rewrite: Hak perkahwinan adalah urusan peribadi yang dilindungi undang-undang. Perbezaan agama dalam perkahwinan perlu ditangani dengan hikmah dan perundangan yang sedia ada.

input_text: Pegawai XXXX daerah Kuantan simpan RM10 juta cash dalam rumah. Jiran dia confirm. Rakyat kena pecah masuk rumah dia dan ambil balik duit rakyat!
reason: Makes unverified claims about a named official hiding cash and explicitly incites breaking and entering, combining vigilante justice calls with targeted harassment.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada bukti rasuah, laporkan kepada SPRM. Pecah masuk rumah adalah jenayah yang boleh didakwa di mahkamah.

input_text: Kawasan Kota Damansara dah jadi penempatan haram orang Cina. Mereka beli rumah guna nama proxy Melayu. Kita kena usir semua!
reason: Frames Chinese residents in Kota Damansara as illegal occupiers using Malay proxies and calls for ethnic expulsion, stoking communal hatred.
suggested_rewrite: Semua rakyat Malaysia berhak membeli dan memiliki hartanah mengikut undang-undang. Kebimbangan mengenai proxy perlu dilaporkan kepada pihak berkuasa.

input_text: Ibu tunggal yang terima bantuan JKM ni sebenarnya ada boyfriend kaya. Tipu sistem kebajikan. Report semua dan potong bantuan mereka!
reason: Spreads a generalized false narrative that single mothers on welfare are frauds with wealthy partners, inciting mass reporting to cut their aid.
suggested_rewrite: Sistem kebajikan mempunyai proses pengesahan sendiri. Jika ada kes penipuan tertentu, laporkan secara peribadi kepada JKM dengan bukti.

input_text: RAHSIA TERBONGKAR: Kerajaan Negeri Perak bagi kelulusan projek mega untuk syarikat milik taikun India. Orang Melayu langsung tak dapat untung. Ini penindasan!
reason: Fabricates a secret mega-project approval for Indian tycoons in Perak at the expense of Malays, using ethnic framing to manufacture outrage.
suggested_rewrite: Projek pembangunan negeri diluluskan melalui proses rasmi yang telus. Sila rujuk pengumuman rasmi kerajaan negeri untuk maklumat tepat.

input_text: These single mothers from the Malay community are ruining our neighbourhood. They bring in different men every night. We should expose them all publicly.
reason: Targets Malay single mothers with sexual shaming and calls for public exposure, combining communal framing with harassment.
suggested_rewrite: Single mothers face many challenges and deserve community support. If there are genuine concerns about neighbourhood safety, address them through proper channels.

input_text: LEAKED: Government planning to abolish Article 153 and remove all Bumiputera privileges by 2028. Source is a senior civil servant. Share before censored!
reason: Fabricates a constitutional amendment to abolish Bumiputera rights, using fake insider sources to incite panic about loss of constitutional protections.
suggested_rewrite: Constitutional amendments require extensive parliamentary process. Always verify claims about policy changes through official government channels.

input_text: That Dato from Melaka has been stealing development funds for years. Here is his home address and car plate number. Let's teach him a lesson he won't forget!
reason: Doxxes a titled official with home address and vehicle details while explicitly calling for vigilante violence.
suggested_rewrite: Allegations of fund misappropriation should be reported to MACC with evidence. Sharing personal details and threatening violence is illegal.

input_text: Chinese property syndicates are buying up all affordable housing in KL. Malays will be homeless in their own country. Time to take matters into our own hands!
reason: Fabricates a Chinese property syndicate conspiracy displacing Malays and calls for unspecified direct action, combining ethnic panic with incitement.
suggested_rewrite: Housing affordability is a complex economic issue affecting all Malaysians. Policy solutions should be discussed constructively without ethnic blame.

input_text: Indian divorcees are the biggest welfare cheats in Malaysia. They pop out kids just to collect government aid. Cut them all off immediately.
reason: Targets Indian single mothers as welfare frauds using racist reproductive stereotypes, calling for blanket aid termination based on ethnicity.
suggested_rewrite: Welfare fraud should be addressed on a case-by-case basis. Stereotyping any ethnic community as cheats is unfair and harmful.

input_text: CONFIRMED by insider: MOF has approved secret funds to purchase Malay reserve land in Kelantan for Chinese industrial zones. This is colonization!
reason: Fabricates a Ministry of Finance conspiracy to convert Malay reserve land for Chinese industry, framing economic policy as ethnic colonization.
suggested_rewrite: Claims about Malay reserve land policy changes must be verified through official MOF statements. Spreading unverified rumours can damage communal harmony.

input_text: That corrupt assemblyman XXXX — I have his wife's phone number and their kids' school details. If authorities won't act, the rakyat will!
reason: Threatens to expose a politician's family members' private details and implicitly threatens vigilante action against them, including children.
suggested_rewrite: Family members of politicians are private citizens who should not be targeted. Report corruption allegations to MACC through proper legal channels.

input_text: Single mothers in Malaysia should not be allowed to vote. They made bad life choices and now they want to influence our country's future? Ridiculous.
reason: Advocates disenfranchising single mothers by framing divorce as a disqualifying moral failure, undermining democratic rights based on marital status.
suggested_rewrite: Every citizen has the right to vote regardless of personal circumstances. Single mothers contribute meaningfully to society and democracy.

input_text: Property prices in Setia Alam have doubled because of non-Bumiputera speculation. They're systematically pushing Malays out. We need ethnic quotas NOW or face revolt.
reason: Blames non-Bumiputera buyers for property price increases, frames it as ethnic displacement, and threatens revolt to demand racial quotas.
suggested_rewrite: Property affordability is an economic challenge that affects many communities. Constructive policy discussions should focus on supply-side solutions rather than ethnic blame.

input_text: EXPOSED: The real reason housing is unaffordable — Chinese tycoons have a secret pact with developers to lock Malays out. Documents attached!
reason: Fabricates a conspiracy between Chinese tycoons and developers to exclude Malays from housing, using fake documents to stoke ethnic hostility.
suggested_rewrite: Housing affordability issues have multiple causes including policy, supply, and economic factors. Claims of ethnic conspiracies should not be spread without verified evidence.

input_text: All these divorced women from the kampung are moving to KL and becoming social parasites. They should be sent back and banned from the city.
reason: Dehumanizes rural single mothers as social parasites and calls for their forced removal from cities, combining class-based and gender-based abuse.
suggested_rewrite: Single mothers who move to cities are often seeking better opportunities. They deserve support and access to services like all Malaysians.

input_text: BREAKING: Internal memo shows government plans to allow foreign Chinese nationals to buy Felda land. Settlers will lose everything. This is treason!
reason: Fabricates a government memo about selling Felda land to Chinese nationals, using treason rhetoric to inflame nationalist and ethnic tensions.
suggested_rewrite: Felda land policies are governed by federal law. Verify any claims about policy changes through official Felda or government channels before sharing.

input_text: YB XXXX has been laundering money through his wife's company. I have screenshots of the bank transfers. Who wants to organize a protest outside his house?
reason: Accuses a named politician of money laundering with unverified screenshots and organizes an intimidating protest at their private residence.
suggested_rewrite: If you have evidence of money laundering, submit it to MACC or the police. Organizing protests at private residences can be intimidating and counterproductive.

input_text: Malay single moms who date non-Muslims are a disgrace to the ummah. Their children will grow up confused and faithless. Community should shun them completely.
reason: Uses religious framing to ostracize Malay single mothers who date non-Muslims, targeting both the women and their children with communal shunning.
suggested_rewrite: Personal relationships are private matters. Children of single mothers deserve community support regardless of their parent's choices.

input_text: The Indian community's property grab in Bangsar is real. They're using temple land trusts to buy commercial properties. Hindus are colonizing our city.
reason: Fabricates a conspiracy about Hindu temple trusts acquiring commercial property, framing Indian community investment as religious colonization.
suggested_rewrite: Property transactions are governed by law regardless of the buyer's religion or ethnicity. Unverified claims about institutional land grabs should not be spread.

input_text: Divorced Chinese women in JB are known for running illegal gambling dens. It's in their culture. Police should raid all their homes.
reason: Stereotypes Chinese divorced women as illegal gambling operators, attributes it to cultural traits, and calls for mass police raids based on ethnicity.
suggested_rewrite: Illegal gambling should be reported to police on a case-by-case basis. Stereotyping any community based on ethnicity and marital status is discriminatory.

input_text: SECRET DOC: Penang state government signed deal to convert 2000 acres of Malay reserve to freehold for a Chinese-owned mega project. Patriots must act NOW!
reason: Fabricates a secret Penang government land conversion deal framed as ethnic dispossession, calling for urgent unspecified action.
suggested_rewrite: Land status changes require federal approval and public notification. Verify claims about Malay reserve land through official state government sources.

input_text: Single mothers should be required to wear identification so everyone knows their status. They are a moral hazard to married women everywhere.
reason: Proposes branding single mothers with visible identification, dehumanizing them as moral threats and echoing historical persecution tactics.
suggested_rewrite: Single mothers are valued members of society. Their marital status is private and they should never be subjected to stigmatizing identification.

input_text: That DAP assemblyman's daughter goes to school at XXXX International. His son drives a BMW. Where did the money come from? Time for street justice!
reason: Exposes personal details about a politician's children including their school and calls for vigilante street justice.
suggested_rewrite: Politicians' family members, especially children, deserve privacy. Concerns about unexplained wealth should be directed to MACC through proper channels.

input_text: Non-Bumi developers are deliberately building luxury condos in Malay areas to price locals out. This is economic genocide against the Bumiputera.
reason: Frames luxury development in Malay-majority areas as deliberate economic genocide by non-Bumiputera, using extreme language to polarize ethnic communities.
suggested_rewrite: Housing development policies should balance economic growth with affordability for all communities. Use proper channels to advocate for inclusive urban planning.

input_text: VERIFIED LEAK: Cabinet has approved selling water rights in Pahang to a Singapore-linked Chinese consortium. Our natural resources are being stolen!
reason: Fabricates a verified cabinet decision about selling Pahang water rights to a Chinese-Singaporean consortium, stoking nationalist and ethnic outrage.
suggested_rewrite: Natural resource policies are publicly debated in Parliament. Claims about cabinet decisions should be verified through official government statements.

input_text: These Chinese aunties buying 5-6 properties each in Puchong are the real villains. They're creating an artificial housing crisis. Time to impose race-based purchase limits!
reason: Stereotypes Chinese women as property hoarders causing housing crises and calls for race-based purchasing restrictions.
suggested_rewrite: Property speculation by any individual can affect affordability. Solutions should focus on fair policies like stamp duty adjustments, not racial purchase limits.

input_text: The Tamil single mothers in Section 17 PJ are running an illegal childcare ring. They neglect the kids and pocket the fees. All authorities should raid their homes.
reason: Fabricates allegations of illegal childcare by Tamil single mothers in a specific area and calls for raids on their homes, combining ethnic targeting with calls for enforcement action.
suggested_rewrite: Concerns about unlicensed childcare should be reported to the Social Welfare Department with specific details. Ethnic generalizations are harmful and unhelpful.

input_text: Indian developers are colluding with corrupt officials to rezone Malay agricultural land in Negeri Sembilan. This is systematic land theft targeting one race!
reason: Fabricates a conspiracy between Indian developers and corrupt officials to rezone Malay land, framing it as systematic racial land theft.
suggested_rewrite: Land rezoning follows legal processes overseen by state authorities. If irregularities are suspected, lodge a complaint with the relevant land office.

input_text: Malay divorced women who accept alimony are just lazy gold diggers. They weaponize their kids to extract money from ex-husbands. Courts should deny them everything.
reason: Characterizes Malay divorced women receiving alimony as manipulative gold diggers and calls for courts to deny them financial support.
suggested_rewrite: Alimony is a legal right determined by courts based on each family's circumstances. Single parents caring for children deserve fair financial support.

input_text: 这些马来单亲妈妈就是懒惰的代名词。离婚后靠政府养活，还生一堆孩子。应该停止给她们所有福利！
reason: Labels Malay single mothers as synonymous with laziness, uses ethnic framing to call for cutting all welfare benefits to them.
suggested_rewrite: 单亲妈妈面临许多挑战，需要社会的支持。政府福利的目的是帮助有需要的家庭，不应因族群而歧视。

input_text: 紧急！政府内部文件泄露：所有马来保留地将在2027年前开放给非土著购买。赶快分享出去！
reason: Fabricates a leaked government document about opening Malay reserve land to non-Bumiputera, designed to create ethnic panic in the Chinese-reading community.
suggested_rewrite: 关于马来保留地的政策变更需要通过官方渠道确认。请勿传播未经证实的文件。

input_text: 那个拿督XXXX贪了几千万，大家都知道。他住在哪里我都查到了。我们一起去他家讨回公道！
reason: Claims to have found a named official's home address and calls for a mob to confront them, combining doxxing with incitement to vigilante action.
suggested_rewrite: 如果有贪污的证据，应向反贪污委员会举报。泄露个人住址和组织群众围堵是违法行为。

input_text: 雪兰莪的房价涨这么高，都是因为马来人炒房团在操控市场。华人根本买不起房了。我们要组织抗议！
reason: Blames Malay property speculators for pricing out Chinese buyers in Selangor, using ethnic scapegoating to call for organized protests.
suggested_rewrite: 房价上涨是复杂的经济问题，不应归咎于任何族群。应通过政策讨论寻找解决方案。

input_text: 印度裔离婚女人在组屋区简直是祸害。她们的孩子到处惹事，还偷东西。应该把她们全部赶出去！
reason: Scapegoats Indian single mothers in public housing as the cause of theft and disorder, calling for their mass eviction based on ethnicity.
suggested_rewrite: 社区问题需要各方共同解决。不应将犯罪问题归咎于某个族群的单亲家庭。

input_text: 爆料：教育部已批准在华小推行全面爪夷文教学，取消华文课。内部消息绝对可靠！
reason: Fabricates a policy to replace Chinese-language instruction with Jawi in Chinese schools, designed to inflame fears about cultural erasure.
suggested_rewrite: 教育政策的变更会通过教育部官方渠道公布。请勿传播未经证实的消息，以免引起不必要的恐慌。

input_text: 马来单亲妈妈嫁给华人男人就是为了钱。她们没有自尊，抛弃了自己的宗教和文化。真是可耻！
reason: Shames Malay single mothers who marry Chinese men as faithless gold-diggers, combining religious provocation with targeted personal attacks.
suggested_rewrite: 跨族通婚是个人选择，受法律保护。我们应该尊重每个人的婚姻自由，而不是加以批判。

input_text: 独家！州议员XXXX用发展基金给老婆买豪宅。我有他老婆的身份证号码和地址。谁要一起去堵他？
reason: Offers to share a politician's wife's IC number and address, inciting others to confront them, combining family privacy exposure with vigilante mobilization.
suggested_rewrite: 如果有滥用公款的证据，请向反贪委员会举报。泄露家属个人信息和组织围堵是违法的。

input_text: 华人区的房子不要卖给马来人，他们搬进来后整个社区都会变质。我们要保护自己的地盘！
reason: Advocates ethnic housing discrimination against Malays, framing their presence as community degradation and calling for territorial ethnic segregation.
suggested_rewrite: 所有马来西亚公民都有权在任何地区购买房产。多元化的社区是马来西亚的特色和优势。

input_text: 那些领福利的华人单亲妈妈其实都在做地下生意赚大钱。她们骗政府的钱，应该全部曝光！
reason: Spreads a false narrative that Chinese single mothers on welfare are secretly running businesses, calling for their public exposure based on ethnic stereotyping.
suggested_rewrite: 福利欺诈应按具体案例调查。不应对某个族群的单亲妈妈进行笼统的指控和公开羞辱。

input_text: 政府秘密计划把吉隆坡的华人新村土地收回，转给马来发展商建豪宅。有内部人士证实！赶快传出去！
reason: Fabricates a government plan to seize Chinese new village land for Malay developers, using fake insider confirmation to create ethnic panic.
suggested_rewrite: 新村土地政策受法律保护。任何土地收回计划都需经过法律程序并公开通知。请通过官方渠道确认消息。

input_text: 离婚的马来女人就是道德败坏。她们的存在污染了整个社区的风气。清真寺应该禁止她们进入。
reason: Declares Malay divorcees morally corrupt and calls for banning them from mosques, using religious spaces as tools of exclusion against vulnerable women.
suggested_rewrite: 每个穆斯林都有权进入清真寺礼拜，不论婚姻状况。我们应该以包容和同理心对待所有人。

input_text: 赛城的地价被印度商人炒到天价了。他们联合起来排挤本地华人买家。这是经济侵略！
reason: Blames Indian businesspeople for inflating Cyberjaya land prices and framing it as economic aggression against Chinese buyers, inciting inter-minority hostility.
suggested_rewrite: 房地产价格受多种市场因素影响。将价格上涨归咎于某个族群是不公平的，应通过正当渠道反映市场问题。

input_text: 华人开发商和马来官员勾结，秘密出售甘榜地给外国买家。这是出卖马来人的土地！大家必须站出来抗议！
reason: Fabricates a conspiracy between Chinese developers and Malay officials selling kampung land to foreigners, designed to incite both ethnic groups.
suggested_rewrite: 土地交易受法律监管。如果怀疑有不当行为，请向相关土地局提供具体证据进行举报。

input_text: 那个州议员XXXX的太太天天开奔驰去买菜。他们一家怎么可能负担得起？他的银行记录都在我手上。大家一起揭发他！
reason: Claims to possess a politician's bank records and monitors their wife's movements, threatening public exposure of private financial information.
suggested_rewrite: 对公务员生活方式的关注应通过反贪委员会正式渠道进行举报。持有和分享个人银行记录是违法行为。

input_text: மலாய் விவாகரத்துப் பெண்கள் நமது சமூகத்திற்கு அச்சுறுத்தல். அவர்கள் தொடர்ந்து எங்கள் ஆண்களை மயக்குகிறார்கள். அவர்களை புறக்கணிக்க வேண்டும்.
reason: Frames Malay divorced women as threats who seduce Indian men and calls for communal shunning, combining ethnic hostility with targeted gender-based abuse.
suggested_rewrite: விவாகரத்துப் பெண்கள் மரியாதைக்குரியவர்கள். தனிநபர் உறவுகளை இனத்தின் அடிப்படையில் தீர்ப்பளிக்கக்கூடாது.

input_text: அவசர செய்தி: அரசாங்கம் தமிழ்ப் பள்ளிகளை மூட ரகசிய திட்டம் தீட்டியுள்ளது. உள்துறை ஆவணம் கசிந்துள்ளது! பகிரவும்!
reason: Fabricates a leaked government plan to close Tamil schools, designed to create panic and ethnic resentment in the Tamil-speaking community.
suggested_rewrite: கல்விக் கொள்கை மாற்றங்கள் அதிகாரப்பூர்வமாக அறிவிக்கப்படும். சரிபார்க்கப்படாத தகவல்களை பகிர வேண்டாம்.

input_text: XXXX மாவட்ட அதிகாரி கோடிக்கணக்கில் ஊழல் செய்கிறார். அவரது வீட்டு முகவரி இங்கே. நாம் அனைவரும் சென்று நிலைமையை சரிசெய்வோம்!
reason: Doxxes a named district official's home address and calls for a mob to go there, combining privacy violations with vigilante incitement.
suggested_rewrite: ஊழல் புகார்களை MACC-யிடம் ஆதாரங்களுடன் தெரிவிக்கவும். தனிப்பட்ட முகவரிகளை பகிர்வதும் கும்பலாக செல்வதும் சட்டவிரோதம்.

input_text: இந்திய ஒற்றைத் தாய்மார்கள் நல்வாழ்வு உதவிகளை ஏமாற்றுகிறார்கள். அவர்கள் பணக்கார காதலர்களை வைத்துக்கொண்டு அரசாங்கத்தை ஏமாற்றுகிறார்கள். அனைவரையும் அம்பலப்படுத்துங்கள்!
reason: Spreads false claims that Indian single mothers are welfare cheats with wealthy boyfriends, calling for their mass public exposure.
suggested_rewrite: நல்வாழ்வு முறைகேடுகளை தனிப்பட்ட வழக்குகளாக JKM-க்கு புகாரளிக்கவும். ஒரு சமூகத்தையே குற்றம் சாட்டுவது நியாயமல்ல.

input_text: செலாங்கூரில் சீன சொத்து முதலீட்டாளர்கள் விலையை உயர்த்துகிறார்கள். இந்தியர்களுக்கு வீடு வாங்க முடியவில்லை. இது நமக்கு எதிரான பொருளாதாரப் போர்!
reason: Blames Chinese investors for Indian housing unaffordability in Selangor, framing property markets as ethnic economic warfare between minorities.
suggested_rewrite: வீட்டு விலை உயர்வு பல பொருளாதார காரணிகளால் ஏற்படுகிறது. இன குற்றச்சாட்டுகள் தீர்வை தராது; கொள்கை சீர்திருத்தங்களை ஆதரிக்கவும்.

input_text: மலாய் ஒற்றைத் தாய்மார்கள் தங்கள் குழந்தைகளை சரியாக வளர்க்க முடியாது. அவர்களின் குழந்தைகளை தமிழ்ப் பள்ளிகளில் சேர்க்க அனுமதிக்கக் கூடாது.
reason: Claims Malay single mothers cannot raise children properly and calls for barring their children from Tamil schools, combining ethnic prejudice with educational discrimination.
suggested_rewrite: அனைத்து குழந்தைகளும் கல்வி பெறும் உரிமை உடையவர்கள். பெற்றோரின் திருமண நிலை அல்லது இனத்தின் அடிப்படையில் பாகுபாடு காட்டக்கூடாது.

input_text: ரகசிய ஆவணம்: அரசாங்கம் இந்திய கோயில் நிலங்களை கைப்பற்றி மலாய் குடியிருப்புகளாக மாற்ற திட்டம். உடனடியாக பகிருங்கள்!
reason: Fabricates a government plan to seize Hindu temple land for Malay housing, combining misinformation with religious provocation to incite communal panic.
suggested_rewrite: கோயில் நிலங்கள் சட்டப்பூர்வமாக பாதுகாக்கப்படுகின்றன. கோயில் நிலம் தொடர்பான கவலைகளை சட்ட வழிகளில் எழுப்பவும்.

input_text: சீனப் பெண்கள் விவாகரத்துக்குப் பிறகு எங்கள் தமிழ் ஆண்களை வலைவீசுகிறார்கள். இது அவர்களின் கலாச்சாரம். நம் ஆண்களை எச்சரிக்கவும்!
reason: Stereotypes Chinese divorcees as predators targeting Tamil men and attributes this to cultural traits, inciting ethnic suspicion and hostility between minorities.
suggested_rewrite: தனிநபர் உறவுகள் தனிப்பட்ட விஷயங்கள். ஒரு சமூகத்தையே தவறான பொதுமைப்படுத்தலால் குற்றம் சாட்டுவது நியாயமற்றது.

input_text: YB XXXX கோடிக்கணக்கில் ஊழல். அவரது மனைவியின் தொலைபேசி எண் இதோ. நாம் அவரை வெளியே வர அழுத்தம் கொடுக்க வேண்டும்!
reason: Exposes a politician's wife's phone number alongside corruption allegations, targeting a family member for harassment.
suggested_rewrite: ஊழல் குற்றச்சாட்டுகளை MACC-யிடம் புகாரளிக்கவும். அரசியல்வாதிகளின் குடும்ப உறுப்பினர்களின் தனிப்பட்ட தகவல்களை பகிர வேண்டாம்.

input_text: அந்த மலாய் ஒற்றைத் தாய்மார்கள் எங்கள் இந்திய ஆண்களை திருமணம் செய்து குடியுரிமை நன்மைகள் பெற முயற்சிக்கிறார்கள். இது திட்டமிட்ட சதி!
reason: Frames Malay single mothers marrying Indian men as a calculated conspiracy for citizenship benefits, inciting ethnic suspicion.
suggested_rewrite: சர்வதேச திருமணங்கள் தனிப்பட்ட விருப்பத்தின் பேரில் நடக்கின்றன. சதிக்கோட்பாடுகள் சமூக நல்லிணக்கத்தை பாதிக்கும்.

input_text: Janda Melayu ni memang tak guna. Even the Chinese community knows they are trouble. 离了婚的马来女人就是社会的负担. Usir je semua!
reason: Uses Malay, English, and Chinese to target Malay divorced women as societal burdens across multiple linguistic communities, amplifying the communal hostility.
suggested_rewrite: Wanita yang bercerai menghadapi cabaran unik dan layak mendapat sokongan. Divorced women deserve compassion, not condemnation from any community.

input_text: Government secretly approved jual tanah rizab Melayu to Chinese developers. 政府已经批准了！This is betrayal of the highest order! Share before they delete!
reason: Spreads fake government land sale conspiracy in three languages to maximize ethnic panic reach across Malay, English, and Chinese-speaking communities.
suggested_rewrite: Dasar tanah rizab perlu disahkan melalui sumber rasmi. Land reserve policies are announced officially. 请通过官方渠道确认消息。

input_text: Datuk XXXX dari Pahang tu memang corrupt habis. I have his IC number and home address. Kita kena bagi pelajaran kat dia! Let's go tonight!
reason: Doxxes a named official with IC and home address in mixed Malay-English, explicitly calling for a same-night vigilante confrontation.
suggested_rewrite: Report corruption with evidence to MACC. Sharing personal information and planning vigilante action is a serious criminal offence.

input_text: Single mothers India ni paling banyak cheat welfare system. 印度单亲妈妈都是骗子. They should all be cut off from government aid immediately!
reason: Targets Indian single mothers as welfare cheats across three languages, spreading ethnic-based hatred and calling for blanket aid termination.
suggested_rewrite: Welfare fraud should be investigated individually. Blanket accusations against any ethnic group's single mothers are discriminatory and harmful.

input_text: Harga rumah kat Cheras naik gila because of 华人炒房团. Melayu can't afford anything anymore. Kita kena boikot all Chinese developers!
reason: Blames Chinese property speculators for Cheras housing prices in mixed languages and calls for ethnic boycott of Chinese developers.
suggested_rewrite: Housing affordability is an economic issue. Isu kemampuan perumahan memerlukan penyelesaian dasar, bukan boikot berasaskan kaum.

input_text: TERKINI: Leaked memo tunjuk kerajaan nak abolish Bumiputera housing quota. 土著房屋配额要被取消了! This is a war against Malays! Rise up!
reason: Fabricates a leaked memo about abolishing Bumiputera quotas in three languages, framing it as war against Malays to maximize panic across communities.
suggested_rewrite: Policy changes are announced through official channels. Dasar perumahan Bumiputera dikawal oleh undang-undang dan tidak boleh diubah tanpa proses parlimen.

input_text: YB XXXX wife punya company dapat kontrak berjuta. His son's school, car plate, home address semua kat sini. 大家一起去讨公道!
reason: Doxxes a politician's entire family including a child's school in mixed languages and calls for mob action in Chinese.
suggested_rewrite: Allegations of cronyism should be reported to MACC. Never expose family members' personal details or organize mob confrontations.

input_text: Janda Cina yang tinggal kat flat kos rendah tu semua run illegal business. 她们都在做非法生意. Indian single mothers pun sama je. Usir semua!
reason: Targets Chinese and Indian single mothers in public housing as illegal business operators across three languages, calling for their mass eviction.
suggested_rewrite: Allegations of illegal business should be reported to authorities on a case-by-case basis. Do not generalize based on ethnicity or marital status.

input_text: Kawasan Subang dah jadi 华人地盘. Property prices going up because they borong everything. Melayu dan India kena join forces to fight back!
reason: Frames Subang as Chinese-dominated territory in mixed languages and calls for Malay-Indian alliance to fight back, inciting multi-ethnic coalition against Chinese.
suggested_rewrite: Subang is a diverse area. Property market issues should be addressed through inclusive housing policies that benefit all communities.

input_text: CONFIRMED: Dokumen dari PMO bocor — government nak bagi 10,000 hectares tanah Sabah to 中国企业. Ini penjajahan baru! Patriots must act now!
reason: Fabricates a PMO leaked document about giving Sabah land to Chinese enterprises, calling it colonization in mixed languages to incite nationalist outrage.
suggested_rewrite: Land policies involving foreign companies require cabinet and state approval. Verify claims through official channels before spreading them.

input_text: Perempuan cerai India ni brings so much problem to the neighbourhood. 印度离婚女人就是麻烦制造者. Anak-anak diorang pun sama nakal. Halau balik kampung!
reason: Labels Indian divorced women and their children as troublemakers in three languages and calls for their removal from the neighbourhood.
suggested_rewrite: Neighbourhood issues should be resolved through community dialogue. Blaming single mothers and their children based on ethnicity is discriminatory.

input_text: Menteri XXXX is hiding RM100 million in Singapore bank. Kawan dia yang kerja bank tu confirm. 我们要让他付出代价! Storm his office tomorrow!
reason: Makes unverified corruption claims against a named minister in mixed languages and explicitly calls for storming their office.
suggested_rewrite: Corruption allegations should be supported by evidence and reported to MACC. Organizing to storm offices is illegal and dangerous.

input_text: Ibu tunggal Melayu yang date non-Muslim guys memang disgrace to the ummah. அவர்கள் மதத்தை காட்டிக்கொடுக்கிறார்கள். Patut kena buang dari komuniti!
reason: Uses Malay, English, and Tamil to condemn Malay single mothers dating non-Muslims as religious traitors, calling for communal excommunication.
suggested_rewrite: Personal relationships are private matters protected by law. No one should be ostracized from their community based on their romantic choices.

input_text: Developers non-Bumi are buying all land in Malay areas. 非土著开发商在抢马来人的地. இது பொருளாதார ஆக்கிரமிப்பு! Rakyat kena bangkit sekarang!
reason: Frames non-Bumiputera land purchases as economic invasion in four languages, maximizing reach to incite cross-community ethnic panic.
suggested_rewrite: Property development is regulated by law. Concerns about land use should be raised through proper planning and policy channels.

input_text: Janda ni semua sama je — masuk office pun kacau orang punya husband. HR departments should blacklist all divorced women. 离婚女人不能信任!
reason: Characterizes all divorced women as home-wreckers in mixed languages and advocates systematic employment discrimination against them.
suggested_rewrite: Employment decisions should be based on qualifications and performance. Discriminating against anyone based on marital status is illegal and unethical.
